title: No convention governs canonical-process governance against unplanned architectural surface
description: No convention governs the canonical-process gate (gap->DEC->plan before new surface) and convention-enforcement governance. DEC-0012 (revert the unplanned pre-identity escape hatch) and DEC-0016 (enforce convention articulation) were decided in this domain without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering canonical-process / governance-enforcement

proposed_resolution: Author a convention governing canonical-process + governance-enforcement; re-point DEC-0012/DEC-0016 to item_governed_by_convention; close this gap.
